pi_items.source: Task description (task.json) specifies exact policy name in instructions
Task description requires assignment to 'Grade A' employee grade
Task description specifies 12 days; aligned with India Factories Act (12 days casual leave minimum); verified via search on Indian leave policy
Task instructions specify 'No' for Carry Forward; consistent with Indian labor law where casual leave cannot be carried over
Task description specifies 10 days; within Indian legal range of 5-12 days sick leave per year
Task instructions specify 'No' for Carry Forward; consistent with Indian labor law where sick leave cannot be carried over
Task description specifies 15 days; matches India Factories Act requirement of 15 working days earned leave per year
Task instructions specify 'Yes' for Carry Forward; consistent with Indian labor law where earned leave can be carried to next year

Firebird database (AttendHRM's native database) uses .fdb extension per Windows conventions; ProgramData directory is standard Windows location for application data; path structure consistent with Lenvica product naming and Firebird conventions

privileged_info_summary: This task configures a leave policy in AttendHRM (Lenvica HRMS), an HR management software that uses Firebird database. The policy 'Grade A - Annual Leave Policy 2025' allocates 12 casual days (no carry forward), 10 sick days (no carry forward), and 15 earned days (with carry forward) for Grade A employees in 2025. These entitlements align precisely with Indian labor law requirements under the Factories Act: casual leave (12 days minimum), sick leave (5-12 days range), and earned leave (15 working days) with carry-forward rules matching statutory requirements. The task operates on a Firebird database stored at C:\ProgramData\Lenvica\AttendHRM\Data\AttendHRM.fdb. All metadata values are synthetic (created for this specific task) but represent realistic HR configurations.
